src: The fact that Crosby fought tooth and nail to get the job in an area where the success rate is so limited and expectation so high, clearly indicates his determination.

src: We will inform you about the results of this letter-writing campaign.

src: Of course, she still wasn't as good as Gesner, she didn't outperform him by any means.

src: But ultimately, I mean, he's sure gon na turn round and do it to us.

src: Osborn fired home the 63rd minute winner against the run of play after Nigel Martyn had prevented them from taking the lead with a string of England-class saves.
mt: 奥斯本在比赛的最后一分钟打进了63分的制胜球，打破了英格兰队的连锁防守，尽管尼尔·马丁连续阻止了他们领先。

src: She had seen them on their expensive horses, swooping across country, confident and in command of their horses.
mt: 她曾经看见他们在昂贵的马匹上，翱翔过大地，充满自信，完全掌控着他们的马匹。

src: But if the consensus is one of conviction, then dissent, however surprising, will not be unwarranted in the same way, because everyone will recognize that an attack on the substantive case for the proposition is an attack on the proposition itself.
mt: 但是，如果共识是坚定的，那么异议，尽管令人惊讶，也不会像这样无根据，因为每个人都会认识到对论据的实质性攻击是对论点本身的攻击。

src: When I was in prison I used to grip my fingers and think, ‘Right, do not do anything,’ trying to keep quiet.
mt: 当我在监狱里时，我常常紧紧握住手指，想：“是的，不要做任何事”，试图保持安静。

src: Scott nearly said, ‘ My wife is ill, ’ but he had lied about his situation so many times : other people's wives did not telephone the station as relentlessly as Annabel.
mt: 史密斯几乎说，“我的妻子病了，”但他已经多次撒谎了：其他人的妻子不像安贝尔夫人那样不间断地打电话给站台。

src: But Mrs McWhirter, accepting defeat, spent most of her time away, on the excuse that she was nursing her mother; and the daughter, if she felt like coming home, preferred to regard home as where her mother was.
mt: 但是，麦克威特夫人接受失败后，花了大部分时间在外，借口是照顾她的母亲；而女儿，如果她想回家，宁愿将家视为她母亲所在的地方。

src: 'Ere we are, crammed in tightly, when there's a couple of gents next door but one, with a first-class carriage for themselves.
mt: "当我们到达时，我们挤得很紧，邻居们有几对夫妇，他们有一辆第一等的车厢。"

src: She also made a point of staying connected with every woman who fostered a baby from the Foundling Hospital as the charity was so dear to her husband's heart.
mt: 她还特别注意保持与每个在婴儿之家收养的女性联系，因为这家慈善机构对她丈夫的心如此珍贵。

src: It is extremely effective!
mt: 这非常有效！

src: It is not often that you hear a genuine story of a smaller element controlling the larger whole, but spreadsheets and personal computers are just such a case.
mt: "听到一个较小元素真正控制较大的整体并不常见，但电子表格和个人电脑正是这样一个例子。"

src: Also in this study another pupil's comment was ‘ But in this school they see you're different from them — like you would wear glasses — and they will mock you. ’
mt: 在这项研究中，另一个学生的评论是：“但是在这所学校里，他们会认为你不同于他们，就像你戴着眼镜一样，他们会嘲笑你。”

src: They form opinions without sufficient evidence without realizing they have done so, so that ‘crossed-wires’ and other misunderstandings arise.
mt: 他们在没有充分证据的情况下形成意见，不意识到自己已经做出此举，因此导致了‘错线’和其他误解的产生。

src: As the nondrinker I get first go (why?) and it is breathtaking.
mt: 作为不饮酒的人，我首先得到机会（为什么？），它令人惊叹。

src: At the same time as they engage in this political maneuver, US policymakers (both Democrats and Republicans) demand that Vojislav Kostunica, President of Yugoslavia, cooperate with the Hague Tribunal unconditionally.
mt: 在同时进行这次政治操作的同时，美国的政策制定者（无论是民主党人还是共和党人）要求塞尔维亚总统维奥维萨夫·科斯图尼察（Vojislav Kostunica）无条件地与海牙法庭合作。

src: Brussels is the future capital of Europe, it's centrally located in Europe and there isn't much competition.
mt: 布鲁塞尔是欧洲的未来首都，它位于欧洲的中心地带，并且竞争不多。

src: We knew the German signals for the night, so we tricked them into holding fire until we were about a mile out, then complete chaos erupted.
mt: 我们知道了德国的夜间信号，所以我们把他们弄得停火，直到我们大约一英里外，然后混乱爆发。

src: He had struggled valiantly for what is right, he had finished his course, he had kept the faith.
mt: 他拼尽全力为正义而战，他已经完成了课程，他保持了信念。

src: I understand your perspective.
mt: 我理解你的观点。

src: ‘ I will watch over him, ’ reassured Jack.
mt: "‘我会看管他,’杰克保证了。"

src: But in my many private discussions with senior officials in Iran and elsewhere over the last few years, I have heard five such reasons stated with clarity and consistency, and they deserve to be taken seriously.
mt: 然而，在过去几年里，我与伊朗高级官员和其他地方的私人谈话中，听到五个这样的原因被清晰且一致地陈述，这些原因值得被认真对待。

src: Rightly, few of the hypotheses examined in this book will endure but it will have achieved its aim if it provides a foothold for fellow students who also appreciate the need to abandon what may glibly be characterised as the ‘Beowulf and brooches’ approach.
mt: "当然，书中探讨的许多假设可能不会长久，但如果它为同样欣赏放弃所谓的‘Beowulf和珠宝’方法的人提供了一个基础，这本书就达到了它的目的。" In this translation, I have used "Beowulf和珠宝" as a direct translation for "Beowulf and brooches," which is an idiomatic expression in Chinese. The phrase "放弃所谓的‘Beowulf和珠宝’方法" is used to convey the idea of abandoning a certain approach that may be superficially appealing but is not truly effective. The rest of the sentence has been translated to maintain the original meaning and tone.

src: He had been hiding out, being homeless, until three days ago when he arrived in Paris to look up another man indebted to him.
mt: 他一直在躲藏，直到三天前才来到巴黎，去找一个欠他钱的人。

src: Outside of the Square Mile, it's practically invisible in the UK rdbms market, where Oracle runs unchecked, Ingres still does well thanks to its ICL agreement into local and central government, and Informix, while selling like hot cakes, still mostly shifts its C-ISAM and Standard engines, not the high ticket OnLine.
mt: 在Square Mile之外，英国RDBMS市场几乎看不见，Oracle在这里毫无阻碍地运行，Ingres仍然表现良好，得益于其与ICL的本地和中央政府的协议，Informix虽然销售如火如荼，但主要还是在使用其C-ISAM和Standard引擎，而不是高价的OnLine。

src: Losing my job did not really affect my confidence.
mt: 失去工作并没有真正影响我的自信。

src: She had accepted Newley's affair with Arabella; she believed that she had her husband precisely where she wanted him.
mt: 她接受了纽尔的和阿拉贝拉的恋情；她相信她把丈夫置于她想要的地方。

src: They all admire her too.
mt: 他们都很钦佩她。

src: Glen Hoddle, the man who abandoned Swindon Town, walked into this afternoon's transfer tribunal fearing his playing career was over.
mt: 格伦·霍德尔，离开斯温顿镇的男人，今天下午的转会听证会上走进来，担心他的球员生涯已经结束。

src: When you look at the details, most of the items that are going to go wrong are excluded, and people get very upset and complain to our department when they can't get it booked right.
mt: 当你看细节时，大多数即将出错的项目都被排除在外，人们非常愤怒，向我们的部门投诉，因为他们无法正确预订。

src: That means power and coal workers crippling the country once again.
mt: 这意味着煤炭和电力工人再次削弱国家。

src: Early computer tapes and discs are going to be very challenging.

src: Adultery makes Ray think carefully about things.

src: He insisted that it was an extra precautionary measure for tougher times ahead.
mt: 他坚持认为这是为了应对更艰难的未来而采取的额外预防措施。

src: Instead, here she was, creeping around her own house like a burglar, trying to avoid a man who annoyed her.
mt: 不过，她在自己的房子里像一个小偷一样爬行，试图避开一个让她恼火的男人。

src: The "ceremonious stomachs" of Russian ambassadors, whose nation places a high value on tradition and etiquette, were the subject of comment in England in the early years of the century, as they had already been in the reign of Elizabeth.
mt: "俄罗斯大使的"庄重胃口"在英格兰早期世纪的初年被评论，因为他们在伊丽莎白女王统治时期就已经存在了，正如俄罗斯对传统和礼仪的重视一样。"

src: Lengthy booklists are expensive and dull: with some time and effort it will be possible for you to build up a personal library and reference system which is individually geared to your particular needs, and one which helps you to build on your existing knowledge rather than attempting to begin again from the beginning.
mt: "长篇大论的书单是昂贵而枯燥的：花点时间和努力，你就能建立一个个性化的图书馆和参考系统，这个系统是为了满足你的具体需求，并且帮助你在现有知识基础上进行扩展，而不是从头开始。" Translation: "长篇大论的书单是昂贵而枯燥的：花点时间和努力，你就能建立一个个性化的图书馆和参考系统，这个系统是为了满足你的具体需求，并且帮助你在现有知识基础上进行扩展，而不是从头开始。"

src: His catch line was,'I can honestly say it's the narrowest escape I've ever had. '

src: So, keep it a secret.

src: So, I suggest, he was tapping into what women wanted — adapting to the situation.
mt: 所以，我建议，他在抓住了女性的心愿——适应了情况。

src: Germany has demonstrated that it is willing to take on responsibility for maintaining stability and order in the former Yugoslavia, and it will play an active role in supporting the Dayton peace agreements, both militarily and politically, including a share of the European Union's reconstruction assistance.
mt: 德国已经表明愿意承担维护前南斯拉夫稳定和秩序的责任，并且将积极参与支持日内瓦和平协议，包括军事和政治方面的支持，以及欧盟重建援助的份额。

mt: "我们和他们只能抵抗国际集体安全行动的合理性退化成美国的帝国主义自恋狂潮，阻止此事进一步升级，并在此过程中防止联合国，唯一可用的世界秩序基础，长期受到损害。"

src: However, a draft report by a secret ministerial advisory group reviewing ‘persistent unemployment’ suggests further measures to bring down the jobless tally could be under consideration.

src: The review continued: ‘The novel positively courts the charge of being overly intelligent in a way that is annoying with a series of condescending footnotes to some of its more arcane vernacular; and it hugs failure to its chest in the form of Guy Vallender's motto: ‘Fireworks thrill because they disappoint.’

src: Lisa took a deep breath, made a silent wish — perhaps it had sounded worse than it was! — and forced her eyes to slide round towards the Bentley.
mt: 莉萨深吸一口气，默默许愿——这可能听起来比实际情况还糟糕！——然后她迫使自己的眼睛转向了Bentley。

src: The meeting was held as advertised and Kinloch addressed it in a wordy speech in which, after pleading with his audience to refrain from violence, he criticized the government for excessive taxation, and declaimed : ‘ In short, the whole of our misfortune as a nation, the whole of our misery, the whole of our distress, can be clearly traced to the circumstances of the people being deprived of their share of the British Constitution by not having a voice in the election of persons to represent them in the House of Commons.’
mt: 会议如预期举行，Kinloch在一场长篇演讲中，首先劝告观众不要进行暴力行为，然后批评政府过高的税收，并宣称：“简而言之，我们国家的所有不幸、所有的痛苦、所有的困境都可以清楚地追溯到人民被剥夺了在英国宪法中拥有一席之地的情况，因为他们没有参与选举代表他们进入下议院的人的选举。”

src: Goering flew from Germany to prevent conflict.
mt: 格尔德·多林从德国飞来，防止冲突。

mt: 奥斯纳菲尔德是英国公民，似乎是一位金融家，他在几次机会中承担了重大风险，但没有足够的证据来对他进行起诉。

src: Erm, may I make a comment on neighbourhood watch, I went to a job the other day, it was a theatre, I was off duty and I got tapped on the shoulder by my local neighbourhood watch co-ordinator who said, nine months ago I resigned, I wrote a letter to headquarters, I wrote a letter to the divisional commander, and I wrote a letter to the local constable, and nobody's replied to me and they still keep sending me papers, are you going to sort yourselves out, now I have brought this up before, we never ever have let a neighbourhood watch scheme lapse, it's nothing to do with you, this is all before you came.
mt: 嗯，我想在邻里巡逻方面提出一个评论。昨天我去了一家工作，那里是一个剧院，我当时是休假。我被当地的邻里巡逻协调员在肩膀上拦住了，他说九个月前我辞职了。我写了一封信给总部，写了一封信给分区司令官，写了一封信给当地警察，但没人回复我，他们还继续给我发文件。你们要解决这些问题吗？现在我提出来了，我们从来没有让邻里巡逻计划停滞不前，这与你们无关，这一切发生在你们出现之前。

src: There's nothing wrong with a man living under an assumed name and besides that, I couldn't prove that Mr Broadhurst and Samuel Northcliffe were the same person, any more than I could prove that it was The Fat Controller who had killed the woman at the Theatre Royal with a spring-loaded hypodermic full of curare, rather than anyone else.
mt: 没什么不好的是一个男人生活在假名之下，而且除此之外，我无法证明布罗赫斯特先生和萨缪尔·北克利夫是同一个人，任何比我证明那位肥胖的管家在剧院皇家用弹簧装满的注射器杀死那位女士都要困难得多。

src: Anemones are mainly plankton feeders and fish are not regarded as potential prey so there is no loss to the anemone in preventing all fish from getting too close by adopting such a strategy.

mt: 训练师打算让八岁的马儿，Richard Dunwoody很可能在Hennessy比赛中骑乘，去纽伯里赛马场进行一场加速赛，以将其带到最佳状态。

src: It annoys me.

src: It's a real effort to click back to that frame of mind, which is bad because fanaticism is the true experience of pop, not discrimination and broad-mindedness — I think of the splendid devotion of all those boys and girls, who as soon as they have got hold of the new Cure or New Order or Bunnymen record, immediately set to memorizing the lyrics, then spend days exhaustively interpreting the Tablets From on High, struggling to establish some fit between their experience and what is actually some drunken doggerel cobbled together in a studio off-moment.
mt: 这是回到那个心态的真正努力，真是令人遗憾，因为真正的流行体验不是排斥和宽容，而是狂热——我想起那些男孩和女孩们的辉煌奉献，他们一听到新乐队Cure、New Order或Bunnymen的专辑就立刻开始记住歌词，然后花费数天，尽力解读《高台的书》，努力将他们的体验与实际上是在录音室里随意拼凑的醉酒狗仔诗相匹配。

src: We gained the upper hand in the FA Cup, but we still have a score to settle.

src: The mania for forming industry consortia is becoming so excessive that a group of leading manufacturers, software developers and vendors are coming together to make some sense of it and eliminate duplicated effort by creating a single consortium to which everyone will be invited to belong : there is no confirmation of suggestions that the idea was the first initiative from new IBM Corp chief Louis Gerstner, who accedes to the top job today, but we hear that the army of companies is still bogged down arguing about what to call the thing — the best they have dreamed up so far is the Consortium for Object-oriented Methods and Programming for the Unix Terminal and Enterprise-wide Recasting of Interactive Networked Database Undertakings with Software Transitioning and Revision for Y'all, but they can not find a snappy acronym to fit the words.

mt: 詹姆斯·特罗恩的关于罗伯特·弗罗斯特诗作《停靠在树林旁》的长期辩论的讨论是有启发性的，因为它认识到一种旨在或声称是客观和全面的风格学的局限性，并且它强调了在描述时要选择性以及在解释中开放多重意义的必要性。

mt: 结束与伴侣的关系可能不是应对中年生活变化的答案，也许你不想离婚，但你很可能会发现，婚姻需要更新，以确保它在接下来的二十或三十年里对双方来说是坚实且互相满意的。

src: He's so eager to learn he almost quivers like Shep there, he repeats everything over and over again, as if he's committing it to memory.
mt: 他对学习如此渴望，以至于几乎像Shep一样颤抖，他不断重复一切，仿佛在记忆中复习。

src: Married off and with a couple of babies in addition.
mt: 已婚并且有两个孩子。

src: Apparently, one might say that an upstanding, law-abiding trade should have nothing to fear where this is concerned; they should simply not deal in masterpieces without a provenance.
mt: 显然，人们可能会说，正直的合法贸易在这方面什么也不应感到害怕；他们应该只不过不应在没有出处的杰作中交易。

src: Hands grasped the now frightened convener as his mates fought to prevent the pressing mob from getting too close.
mt: "手紧紧地抓住了现在惊慌失措的会议主席，他的同伴们努力阻止紧逼的群体靠近。"

src: If you don't believe in the fundamentals underlying the latest fashion, start again from the beginning and carefully examine (and develop) the basic principles on which you manage for profit.
mt: 如果你不相信最新时尚背后的基本原理，就从头开始，仔细审查并发展你管理利润的基本原则。

src: Stirling was taking a huge risk.
mt: 斯特灵正在冒着巨大的风险。

src: The shops took on a new lease of life, the street-sellers, with their lemonade and nougat, ostrich feathers, mummy-beads and scarabs, carnations and roses, and the street-artists, with their boa-constrictors and baboons, regained their enthusiasm, and the city in general resumed its normal manic rhythm.
mt: 商店焕发了新生，街头小贩们，带着他们的柠檬水、松露、秃鹫羽毛、木乃伊珠宝和蝎子，康乃馨和玫瑰，以及街头艺术家们，带着他们的Boa-Constrictor和猴子，重新找回了热情，城市在一般情况下恢复了它的正常狂热节奏。

src: The employer was forced to admit that no replacement had been engaged, which tended to indicate that a redundancy might have been a possibility.
mt: 雇主不得不承认没有雇佣替代者，这表明了可能存在的裁员的可能性。

src: Nicky, of Falkirk, West Lothian, said: ‘It was making the situation even more upsetting to see Des's face on the record cover smiling up at me.’
mt: 尼克，来自福尔基尔，西洛锡安，说道：“看到德斯的脸在唱片封面上微笑着看着我，真的让情况更加令人不安。”

src: If Labour Members are so keen on Ravenscraig staying open, why does the hon. Member for Dunfermline, East (Mr. Brown) not have the courage — or perhaps the influence in the shadow Cabinet — to give an unequivocal commitment that if the Labour party came to power it would keep Ravenscraig open?
mt: 如果工党成员对Ravenscraig保持开放如此热切，为什么前任Dunfermline East议员（Mr. Brown）没有勇气，或者说在影子内阁中没有影响力，向工党当选后明确承诺会继续保持Ravenscraig的开放呢？

src: There were a lot of reputations at stake, particularly at the Serious Fraud Office and prosecution counsel, and they used every possible means to prosecute us until something stuck.
mt: "There were a lot of reputations at stake, particularly at the Serious Fraud Office and prosecution counsel, and they used every possible means to prosecute us until something stuck." 有很多声誉在赌注中，特别是在 Serious Fraud Office 和检察官那里，他们使用了所有可能的方法来对我们进行起诉，直到某事发生了。

src: The couple were treated to a luxurious evening of food and drink before retiring to a plush suite for Valentine's night.
mt: "这对夫妇在感恩节前享受了一顿奢华的晚餐和饮品，随后退到奢华套房中度过了情人节之夜。"

src: We do accuse the Liberal Democrats of jumping on the bandwagon at a late stage, but in this they are acting consistently with their typical behavior and they are confusing the issue by doing their own irrelevant thing.
mt: 我们指责自由民主党在晚些时候跳上了乐队wagon，但他们在此行为上保持了他们的典型行为，并且在做他们自己的无关之事时混淆了问题。

src: ‘ We must remain calm, ’ said Masklin.
mt: “我们必须保持冷静，”说Masklin。

src: Eliminating tax breaks on corporate entertaining would probably do more to break the power of keiretsu than strengthening Japan's feeble antitrust laws or passing intricate rules on cross share-holdings.
mt: "削减企业娱乐税收优惠可能比加强日本的脆弱反垄断法律或制定复杂的跨股权规则更能削弱集团 Keiretsu 的权力。"

src: This is a worthwhile approach, though one should be aware that different mutagens give qualitatively different kinds of mutation.
mt: 这是一个值得称赞的方法，但需要注意的是，不同的致突变剂会导致不同类型的突变。

src: The man found in possession of her stolen cheque book and card has been released without punishment from court.
mt: 这个在她被盗的支票簿和卡片中发现的男人已经从法院无罪释放。

src: Our motor industry has been devastated with redundancies at Rolls-Royce and Ford.
mt: 我们的汽车行业遭受了严重的打击，尤其是罗尔斯罗伊斯和福特的裁员。

src: They say an Ulsterman speaks plainly and knows the value of one.
mt: 他们说乌尔斯特人说得清楚，懂得一分为二的价值。

src: Although clearly at odds with the'socialist' economy, all this is a relatively insignificant amount compared with a far more serious problem — nietroudovyie dokhody — or 'unearned income' — as it is euphemistically called.
mt: 尽管明显与社会主义经济相悖，但这只是一个相对微不足道的问题，与更严重的问题——'不earned income'（非劳动所得）——相比，这个问题被称为'niechodovye dokhody'。

src: Li Yuan turned angrily, glaring at her, then, biting back the retort that had occurred to him, he turned back, looking at Fei Yen.
mt: 李元转身愤怒地盯着她，然后，咬住了想出的回击，他转身，盯着费耶恩。

src: Be quiet, woman!
mt: 请安静，女士！

src: We got votes against our proposals with no reasons given at all, you have now arrived at a position of having no reasons at all for opposing what we want to do.
mt: 我们得到了反对我们的提案的无理由的选票，现在你已经处于反对我们想要做的事情没有理由的地位。

src: Birbeck believed that Branson had tricked them as ‘revenge’ for a Music Week reporter feeding stories disparaging Branson to the satirical magazine Private Eye — and he was partly right.
mt: 布莱克相信布兰登斯有为报纸音乐周记者抄袭他在讽刺杂志《私人眼》上发表贬低布兰登斯的故事报复——他有部分正确。

src: ‘ And they thought barnacles turned into geese, ’ I said, thinking very hard for ancient nonsense.
mt: “‘他们以为螃蟹变成鹅,’ 我说，深思熟虑地思考着古老的荒谬。”

src: Not long afterwards the Dams Raid took place, and this did receive widespread media coverage and captured the imagination of the public.
mt: 不久之后，达姆斯突袭发生了，得到了广泛的媒体关注，并激发了公众的想象力。

src: If, as some think, the French are at last withdrawing from their unsuccessful involvement in the Ivory Coast, they may use their influence to leave something healthy behind.
mt: 如果像一些人认为，法国终于从他们在象牙海岸的失败参与中撤退，他们可能会利用他们的影响力留下一个健康的遗产。

src: These lovely curls and the pretty floral headband attracted our attention.
mt: 这些可爱的卷发和漂亮的花环吸引了我们的注意。

src: I spent the rest of the evening with my relatives gathered closely around me, hoping nobody would notice the idiot in the middle with two completely different shoes.
mt: 我在晚餐后与亲戚们紧密相聚，希望没人注意到在我们中间的傻瓜，他穿着两双完全不同的鞋子。

src: In short, people's in-person confrontations are primarily about'moral careers'.
mt: 简而言之，人们面对面的冲突主要是关于“道德职业”。

src: A complex system with many intricate mechanisms…
mt: 一个复杂的系统，拥有许多精巧的机制…

src: The NLD success apparently extended to gaining the support of the ordinary soldiers, allowing it to win, for example, the garrison district of Dagon in the capital Rangoon.
mt: "NLD 的成功似乎也扩展到了赢得普通士兵的支持，从而赢得了例如在仰光首都的丹戎要塞区的胜利。"

src: The chancellor answered by retaliating with equal force.
mt: "财政大臣以同等的力量进行报复。"

src: Then the firm is given one year to succeed.
mt: 然后公司被给予一年时间来成功。

src: Marche is for the traveller who wants to turn off the tourist trail, to avoid the show places, and get to know the green heartland of Italy, the not so self-conscious Italy.
mt: 马赛是为那些想要离开旅游路线，避开名胜古迹，了解意大利绿色心脏地带的旅行者所准备的地方，不那么自觉的意大利。

src: A signal occasion … the steam train reverting to a bygone era.
mt: "一个标志性的事件 … 蒸汽火车回归到过去的时代。"

src: Mary organized the plates and watched his carving.
mt: 玛丽整理了盘子，观看他切肉。

src: ROY KEANE 'S British record transfer to Blackburn Rovers was still pending last night as the Republic of Ireland midfielder decided to delay the announcement of his new club until after tomorrow's World Cup qualifier against Lithuania in Vilnius.
mt: "罗伊·基恩将英国记录转让给黑本流浪者队的情况仍在昨晚时延，因为中场球员决定在明天对阵立陶宛的世界杯预选赛后再宣布他的新俱乐部。"

src: But things have reached a stage where if a song is not real predictable radio fare then it's regarded as left-field.
mt: 但是事情已经到达了一个阶段，如果一首歌不是预测性广播的常规内容，那么它就被认为是偏离主流的。

src: Cautiously opting for the latter view, Larry manipulates the laws of astrophysics to construct a theory of subjectivity through the metaphoric lens of the uncertainty principle :
mt: 谨慎地选择后者观点，Larry操纵了天体物理学的法则，构建了一个通过不确定性原理的隐喻来解释主观性的理论：

src: In two test cases the Law Lords decided that house-buyers — at least at the cheap end of the market — were entitled to damages against valuers who failed to exercise reasonable skill and care — nor could this liability be excluded by a fine-print disclaimer.
mt: 在两起测试案例中，法官们决定，至少在市场的低端，房屋买家有权对未能在合理的技能和谨慎下进行估价的估价师提起赔偿诉讼——这种责任不能通过小字条款免责声明排除。

src: It's at top speed for the seasons, and, if I can, I work 12 or 14 hours a day then, because otherwise I can't see myself through the quiet times.
mt: "在这个季节上游得很快，如果我能的话，我会工作12或14小时每天，否则我无法在平静的时光中看见自己。"

src: When the chief minister of Maharashtra became uppity earlier this year, Mr Gandhi arranged for dissidents to mount a campaign to get rid of him, and relented only after the chief minister apologized.
mt: 当马哈拉施特拉邦首席部长今年早些时候变得不听话时，甘地安排了反对派人士发起运动来推翻他，最终只有在首席部长道歉后才放弃。

src: Hope Steuart had leaned two loaded muskets against the doorjambs ; he turned to pick one up but the Duke's two sons were on him, holding him.
mt: 希望史蒂瓦特已经把两支装满子弹的霰弹枪对准了门框；他转身去拿一支，但达芬奇的两个儿子正抓着他。

src: The producer, a blase young woman, toyed with a lettuce leaf and an olive, but on the rare occasions I am invited to lunch I generally do without breakfast, so I made up for her and discussed the shooting schedule ( you soon pick up the jargon ) with the director.
mt: 制片人，一位冷漠的年轻女子，玩弄着一片西葫芦叶和橄榄，但在我偶尔被邀请吃午餐时，我通常不吃早餐，所以我补偿了她，并与导演讨论了拍摄日程（你很快就会学会这个术语）。

src: Oh, Jesus, she's extremely annoying us.
mt: 哦，耶稣，她真的很让我们烦恼。

src: He said the combination of bars in the Beaumont Street area of Darlington would eliminate the profits of similar areas in the town.
mt: 他说 Beaumont Street, Darlington 的 Darlington 地区的酒吧组合将消除类似区域的利润。

src: Did I look so obviously the sort to get into trouble that I couldn't go about with circles under my eyes, or telephone a doctor, or throw up occasionally, without everyone immediately jumping to a single conclusion?
mt: 你看起来那么明显是个容易陷入麻烦的人，以至于我不能去做一些像有眼圈、打电话给医生或偶尔呕吐这样的事情而不让所有人立刻得出一个结论吗？

src: That's not bitterness about what happened or anything like it, more a professional belief in myself that it would have been better in the long run for me, Eithne Browne, and probably for Chrissie, too.
mt: 这不是关于发生的事情或类似事件的苦涩，而是我对自己的一种职业信念，即在长期内，这对我(Eithne Browne)来说可能会更好，也许对Chrissie来说也会更好。

src: The conglomerate, acting through its ‘ directing mind and will ’, does not deal in its own shares ; instead it uses information generated by its clients ( or, on occasion, information generated from within the conglomerate itself ) to make profits, or to limit its losses, by trading with the public, or even by giving advice to clients, at a time when it ( the conglomerate ) has access to unpublished price sensitive information pertaining to publicly traded securities.
mt: “该控股公司，通过其‘指挥意志和意愿’，不交易其自己的股票；相反，它利用客户（或偶尔来自控股公司内部）生成的信息，通过公开交易或向客户提供建议，在掌握未公开的敏感价格信息时，来实现利润或限制损失。”

src: I memorized it and pray it often.
mt: 我经常默记它，祈祷它。

src: Seems like he lost his temper, chief.
mt: 看起来他失去控制了，首领。

src: It came as the parents of 12-year-old victim Timothy Parry — critically ill in a Liverpool hospital — came to terms with the fact that he is unlikely to survive.
mt: "当12岁受害者蒂莫西·帕里父母在利物浦医院接受治疗时，意识到他很可能不会存活时，才开始接受这个事实。"

src: Peter said that although fifth was a respectable position he felt the team was capable of pushing for the top spot and added the society was eager for new members or younger people with innovative ideas.
mt: 彼得说虽然第五名是一个值得尊敬的位置，但他认为团队有能力争取第一名，并且社团对新成员或有创新想法的年轻人充满了热情。

src: The back division have badly under-performed while the forwards have hardly made any mistakes, with debutant No 8, Michael Galwey, outstanding.
mt: "后卫队表现不佳，而前锋几乎没有犯错，年轻球员No 8，迈克尔·加尔韦，表现出色。"

src: Gen Noriega ingratiated himself by offering his services to a White House bent on making the Sandinistas admit defeat, although his help for the contra cause was limited.
mt: "冈萨雷斯·尼耶拉通过提供服务于一个想要让桑地诺人承认失败的白宫来讨好自己，尽管他为反对派提供的帮助有限。"

src: Well, how much would it cost then?
mt: 好吧，那要多少钱呢？

src: Reaching a compromise between conservation and access becomes ever more complex, both in the countryside and in historic houses and gardens.
mt: "在乡村和历史建筑及花园之间寻求保护与访问之间的妥协变得越来越复杂。"

src: Boy who raised a false alarm.
mt: 男孩制造了一个虚假的警报。

src: It annoys me, that's all.
mt: 这让我烦恼，那就是全部。

src: Mine is one of those libraries which pays the bill…
mt: 我的那家图书馆是那些支付账单的...

src: Another 95 were being axed in 51 schools, with a possible 90 further redundancies expected to follow.
mt: "另有95人在51所学校被裁员，预计还有90个进一步的裁员可能会跟随。"

src: It was a wonderful feeling — as if I was floating.
mt: 这是一种美妙的感觉，就像我在漂浮一样。

src: Some would say that blame should begin, even end, with Rushdie himself : that this ‘ impertinent, whining guest, ’ as Lord Tebbit unforgivably called him, wrote a calculatedly provocative book, brought the predictable wrath of Islam down upon himself and has since presented the taxpayer with a multi-million pound bill for warding off due retribution.
mt: 有些人会说责任应从Rushdie本人开始，甚至结束：这位“不可遏制的客人”，如不公正的Tebbit所称，他编写了一本精心挑衅的书，引发了预料中的伊斯兰愤怒，随后又向税收付出了一笔数百万英镑的费用来防止应得的报复。

src: ‘ It's all right, I'm just joking. ’
mt: “没关系，我只是开玩笑。”

src: I decided.
mt: 我决定了。

src: Wiping away the blood and regaining his balance, Mayer hissed, ‘I will destroy you.’
mt: 擦去血迹，重新找回平衡，Mayer咆哮道：“我会毁掉你。”

src: asked whether the American army had helped him to overcome his drug addiction.
mt: 问美国军队是否帮助他克服了药物成瘾。

src: A sport, like a new spouse, can be so infatuated with its glamorous partner that it becomes completely enamored.
mt: "像新婚妻一样，运动会对其华丽伴侣产生如此迷恋，以至于完全被迷住了。"

src: Instantly, the situation was completely reversed.
mt: 立即，情况完全翻转了。

src: Wait for updates!
mt: 等一下更新！

src: One of them saw a tarnished wristwatch lying on the beach and decided to trick someone.
mt: "其中一个人看到在沙滩上一个被磨损的手表，决定欺骗别人。"

src: John's already beaten me to the announcement on the straw poll, erm that I was going to do, but suffice to say that we normally do that at these types of seminars and there's always a few people in the room who put their hands up and say they have got more than ten data sources in their organization.
mt: 约翰已经在公告前打败了我，嗯，我打算做的那一件事，但足够说的是，我们通常在这类研讨会上这样做，有时会有几个人举手说他们的组织有超过十个数据源。

src: When she took off her glasses the sun shone directly into her eyes and made them flash like green torches.
mt: 当她摘下眼镜时，太阳直射进她的眼睛，使她的眼睛像绿灯一样闪烁。

src: Their activity amazed and baffled even the sceptical Bernier : ‘ They tell any person his thoughts, cause the branch of a tree to blossom and to produce fruit within an hour, hatch an egg in their bosom within fifteen minutes, producing whatever bird may be demanded, and make it fly around the room.’
mt: "他们的活动让连怀疑的伯纳尔都感到惊讶和困惑：'他们告诉任何人自己的想法，能使树枝在一小时内开花结果，甚至在十五分钟内在胸中孵化出所需的鸟类，并让它在房间里飞来飞去。'"

src: Are not those successful British companies fed up with being talked down by the doom-monger Labour party?
mt: 那些成功的英国公司不厌倦被劳工党那种阴沉的批评者所低估吗？

src: She was going on to recall how yesterday she had thought of Vendelin Gajdusek's being in Prague, when in actual fact, had she known it, he had been sitting right there beside her driving her back to Mariánské Lázně, when he suddenly gave her near heart failure by challenging, completely unexpectedly, ‘I thought you said your name was Fabia?’
mt: 她即将回忆起昨天她曾想象着在布拉格的维德林·加兹杜塞克在场时，实际上，她知道他就在她旁边，坐在车里带她回到玛丽安斯基·拉涅茨，突然，他以完全意外的方式挑战道：“你说你的名字是法比亚吗？”

src: A schoolboy dream becomes a reality for Bill.
mt: "一个小男孩的梦想成真了，成就了比尔。"

src: Whether it's you or one of your kith and kin who's been too clever for their own good, you can be certain it will end in tears.
mt: 无论是你还是你亲戚中的某个人因为过于狡猾而导致的结果，你可以肯定它会以泪水告终。

src: If you found someone such as I have just described, it would get you out of trouble.
mt: 如果你找到了像我刚描述的那样的人，你会摆脱困境。

src: We have been to one town where many have closed down, and others are struggling to survive.
mt: 我们去过一个有很多关闭的城镇，还有一些在艰难时期挣扎求存的。

src: Regal Fox stole the spotlight.
mt: "尊贵的狐狸偷走了聚光灯。"

src: The KDPI were able to come and go across the frontier and through the territory between the opposing armies with great freedom.
mt: "KDPI 能在边境和敌军之间的领土上自由穿梭，穿越敌军之间的边界。"

src: On a week's package holiday at the time, the first break she had been able to afford since leaving drama school, it had taken her all of five minutes to decide to stay.
mt: 在那周的包租假期上，离戏剧学校后，她终于能负担得起的第一次休息，她花费了五分钟就决定留下。

src: This is not the first time the issue of control has come up in this column but because yours is a sign that tends to resist adapting to circumstances, all too often you meet people and circumstances that appear to block your path.
mt: 这不是这个栏目第一次出现控制问题，但由于你的倾向是抵抗适应情况，你经常遇到阻碍你前进的障碍和人。

src: It is alarming that families with children who accept a social fund loan have to manage financially on 85 per cent of their normal income support entitlement.
mt: "令人担忧的是，接受社会基金贷款的家庭必须在其正常收入支持资格的85％的基础上进行财务管理。"

src: These are still occurring and, ultimately, there is no clear distinction between folk tales of unknown origin and accounts of events which have taken place recently.

mt: 请将谈判价格交给你的代理人，并根据他的建议选择买家，买家应该在自己的销售过程中已经很进步；但不要急于求成，不要在没有至少等到第二天并考虑周围所有可能的反思的情况下就解决此事。

src: Keeping the hands warm prevents the condition from worsening.
mt: 保持手温可以防止情况恶化。

src: Income tax is not levied on the entire amount of your money.
mt: 所得税不征收您所有的钱。

src: Stay tuned.
mt: 请保持关注。

src: With less than an hour of daylight remaining, he carried a flashlight — not that it would be of much help with the rain cascading down as if the Maya Rain God had corralled every raincloud in Central America and unleashed them.
mt: "剩下不到一个小时的日光，他带着一支手电筒——但这对雨水倾盆而下，仿佛玛雅雨神把每个雨云捆绑在中美洲并释放它们来说，绝对不会有太大帮助。" In this translation, I have used "仿佛玛雅雨神把每个雨云捆绑在中美洲并释放它们" to convey the idiomatic expression of the Maya Rain God controlling the rain, and "绝对不会有太大帮助" to express the idea that the flashlight wouldn't be much of a help.

src: Last of the big areas where France has fallen behind, at least for the present, is in robotics.
mt: "最后一个法国落后的大领域，至少目前而言，是机器人学。"

src: Too often, though, myth and reality separate outside the door, behind the roses and the last flailing morris dancer.
mt: 通常来说，传说和现实在门外分离，隐藏在玫瑰和最后的挣扎舞者之间。

src: Is it not time he started behaving maturely?
mt: 不该再这样了，他该开始成熟一点了。

src: Tarquin and Lucretia become furious.
mt: 塔奎尼和露西娅变得愤怒。

src: When they first met, Charlie was in charge by improvising in front of the cameras and using his experience from films like Bright Lights, Big City, with Michael J Fox, and 18 Again, with George Burns. He said: ‘Kylie was a little nervous when I improvised and it threw her off.
mt: 当他们第一次见面时，查理通过在摄像机前即兴发挥和他在电影《Bright Lights, Big City》和《18 Again》中的经验，特别是与迈克尔·杰克逊和乔治·伯恩斯合作时，掌控局面。他说：“凯莉在我即兴发挥时显得有些紧张，这让她感到不知所措。”

src: Accept it as is or reject it altogether.
mt: "接受它还是完全拒绝它。"

mt: "鲁本·鲁宾从1920年代开始，努力打造出独特的以色列艺术风格的好范例。一个名为‘纳撒勒，加利利’的作品将在拍卖会上出售，估价为40,000至60,000美元（约20,600至30,900英镑）。"

src: Until two weeks ago, Mr. Lamont was a trusted ally of the Prime Minister, always present when he made the big decisions.
mt: 直到两周前，拉蒙特先生一直是首相的信任盟友，始终在他做出重大决定时陪伴在身边。

src: Making every effort for its Destiny launch, the telephone company offshoot went so far as to score still another first, announcing SVR4.2 simultaneously in Europe, the Far East, the US and Russia, reportedly at a Unix user group meeting, facilitated by the famed Esther Dyson.
mt: 为了其Destiny的发布，电话公司分支机构做出了极大的努力，甚至在欧洲、东亚、美国和俄罗斯同时宣布了SVR4.2，据称是在Unix用户组会议上，由著名的Esther Dyson协助。

src: Always used to receiving admiring glances from men, Laura had not known whether to be pleased or not when the doctor had completely ignored her — clearly being interested only in Julie.
mt: "总是被男人的赞美目光所吸引，劳拉不知道自己该感到高兴还是不高兴，当医生完全忽视了她，显然只对朱莉感兴趣。"

src: Meanwhile Worcestershire's cricketers are remaining calm on their tour of South Africa.
mt: 与此同时，伍斯特郡的板球运动员在访问南非期间保持镇定。

src: Yeah er Prime Minister, John Major, John Major's anxious wife, Norma has a job remaining calm as she faces the anger of a town blighted by unemployment.
mt: 是的，首相约翰·马歇尔，约翰·马歇尔的妻子，安静的诺玛，有一个任务要保持镇静面对一个因失业而沮丧的镇上的愤怒。

src: You could tell they were having a great time doing it, and without taking the piss.
mt: "You could tell they were having a great time doing it, and without taking the piss." 你能看出他们在做这件事时非常开心，而且不在开玩笑。

src: When his or her car was not being illegally clamped, stolen, broken into, photographed by a Gatso camera or failing the MoT emissions test, it was extremely expensive to insure.
mt: 当其车辆不被非法拦截、偷走、被破坏、被Gatso摄像机拍摄或未通过MoT排放测试时，它非常昂贵地保险。

src: A blockade of the rubber ships would soon force Leopold to surrender.

mt: 我们需要在某种方式上领先一步，让他明白写故事或甚至那些隐晦的暗示，像他这种类型的记者们似乎擅长的事情都毫无意义。

src: Sir John — chairman for 17 trophy-laden years in the 70s and 80s — put it another way : ‘ David's appointment will help prevent the predators from threatening us ’.
mt: "先生约翰 — 在70年代和80年代担任17年荣誉满满的主席 — 另一个说法是：‘戴维的任命将帮助我们防止掠夺者的威胁。’"

src: Worse still, he was ungrateful: everyone told him that his mother had had a hard life, that she had toiled relentlessly, but it meant nothing to him.
mt: 更糟的是，他不感恩：每个人都告诉他，他的母亲过着艰难的生活，辛苦工作，但这对他来说毫无意义。

src: There was always something around the corner if you stayed calm.

mt: "嘻哈正在重新发现福克斯的根源，随着狂欢场景逐渐消退，它逐渐成为主流。"

src: Attracting my attention, the young medic grinned and gave a thumbs-up sign.

src: In an unusually perceptive liner note, Robert Layton is exactly right when he says ‘It is the exercise of true symphonic discipline that removes the Tenth from the private world to the universal’.

src: Throwing on a dressing-gown and using a lot of foul language, you stumble to answer it.

mt: 在交换条件下，各州同意与联邦政府合作，减少健康和福利服务的重复，减少州属企业的损失，协调基础设施支出，并在环境保护和职业资格等领域协调法规。

mt: "过去三年里，连续17小时每天经营零食店和餐饮服务，生活非常忙碌。"

mt: CAFE Quick 是一种先进的冷冻食品售货机，它可以在一分钟内从冻结中烹饪出新鲜的餐点。

src: The protest floated at the back of her numbed mind: how could she be so cruel as to deal such a blow only to satisfy her own thirst for scandal?
mt: 她的麻木心灵背后漂浮着抗议：她怎么能如此残忍地打出这样一击，只是为了满足她自己的丑闻渴望？

src: I should've arranged it, now that I reflect on it.
mt: 我应该提前安排了，现在反思后。

src: At McDiarmid Park on Saturday, the 22 year old improved upon his excellent midweek showing for Scotland and played some football which was a delight to the eye.
mt: 在麦迪阿密公园（McDiarmid Park）这周六，22 岁的年轻人超越了他在中间周的出色表现，为苏格兰效力，并打了一场令人眼花缭乱的足球。

src: Some of it was charmingly primitive, some of it so exotically painted that it was breathtaking.
mt: 一些是迷人的原始的，另一些如此奇幻地绘制以至于令人惊叹。

src: But he had the backing of what the chronicler calls the'more foresighted'part of the council, and this tacit approval suggests that the argument was not simply that of an'anti - Woodville' faction, but represented a genuine attempt to avoid causing unrest or destabilization — an attitude in line with what is known of council policy.
mt: 但是他得到了被历史学家称为'更有远见'部分议会的支持，这种默许的批准表明他的论点不仅仅是一个'反伍德维尔派'派系的观点，而是一个真正的努力，旨在避免引发不安或动荡——这与所知的议会政策一致。

src: Although this is the socially efficient output initially, it is not efficient in the long run.
mt: 虽然这是最初的社会效率输出，但在长期内并不高效。

src: We then went a stage further and to share the technology established joint teams for each of these major areas, so that er the specification while it was under Dasa's leadership, it was actually done by a joint team which involved expertise from British Aerospace and the other three and er therefore at that time the whole Eurofighter consortium was confident that they were making the best use of the available expertise across the four partner companies, each contributing their expertise, so that they could go forward on a confident basis.
mt: 我们再进一步了，建立了各个主要领域的联合团队，以便在Dasa的领导下，制定规格时，实际上是由一个联合团队完成的，这个团队包括了英国航空航天集团和其他三家公司的专家。因此，在那个时候，整个Eurofighter联盟对他们能够充分利用四家合作伙伴公司的所提供的专业知识感到自信，从而能够继续前进。

src: But by then various other children were misbehaving too, so I sent them out, and suddenly I realized that half of my class was outside the door enjoying themselves immensely!
mt: 但是当时其他孩子也在不良行为，便把他们送了出去，突然我意识到半个班级在门外享受得非常愉快！

src: And that's the problem.
mt: "And that's the problem." 中文翻译："这是问题所在。" 在这里，"这是问题所在" 是一种常见的表达方式，用来表示某事的核心或根本问题。

src: You have lost your skill and that's a fact.
mt: 你已经丢失了你的技能，这个事实是如此。

src: But initially, as John Donne observed, men lived and believed just as they had before.
mt: 但最初，约翰·多内观察到，男人们就像以前一样生活和信仰。

src: Check your local press for details, or phone the Events Unit on during working hours, Monday to Friday, for further information.
mt: 请查看本地报纸获取详情，或者在工作时间内（周一至周五）拨打事件单位电话获取进一步信息。

src: Going around behind the apse of the Duomo the visitor passes the Palazzo dell'Orologio, named after the clock at the top, which is flanked by statues of darkness and light.
mt: "绕着大教堂的后殿走，游客会经过以顶部钟楼命名的Palazzo dell'Orologio，它被黑暗和光明的雕像所环绕。"

src: Gentlemen : It is with great regret that I see so many students labouring day after day in the Academy, as if they imagined that a liberal art, such as ours, was to be acquired like a mechanical trade, as a result of labour, or I may add the absurdity of supposing that it could be acquired by any means whatever.
mt: 先生们：我深感遗憾地看到许多学生在学院里辛勤工作，每天都像是认为自由艺术，如我们所教授的，应该像机械工艺一样通过劳动来获得，或者更糟的是，认为它可以通过任何手段来获得。

src: Since then others have done the same.
mt: 自那以后，别人也做了同样的事。

src: WIGAN boss John Monie has warned British rugby league : ‘ Sort yourselves out or you will never be world champions. ’
mt: “威根队老板约翰·蒙尼警告英国橄榄球联盟：‘要么自己解决，要么你们永远不会成为世界冠军。’”

src: Now you do not want us to reveal confidential information, do you?
mt: 现在你不想让我们透露机密信息吗？

src: Memorizing them as if they were magic signs.
mt: 记住它们，就像记住魔法符号一样。

src: Gibbon had ordered his men to show no mercy, and the Nez Perce women were crying for the dead, the children screaming from their pain.
mt: 吉本下令他的士兵要无情，内布拉斯加女人为死者哀哭，孩子们因为痛苦而尖叫。

src: ‘ You know what will happen to you, child, if you continue to disobey your father,’ he said wearily, ‘ and if you continue to defy God's will.’
mt: “‘你知道如果你继续反抗父亲，孩子，结果会怎样,’ 他疲惫地说，‘并且如果你继续违背上帝的意志。’”

src: Miss Shields, 27, is currently filming a CBS TV movie, I Love You Intensely — The Laura Black Story, or more likely:
mt: "米莎·希尔兹，27岁，正在拍摄一部CBS电视电影《我爱你极度 Intensely — 露西·黑故事》，或者更有可能是："

src: quite right, the statistics he was actually talking about, and somebody actually pulled him up on this and said, okay you're talking about the number of firms that went bankrupt, but what about new firms being created?
mt: "确实是对的，那些他实际上在谈论的统计数据，有人实际上对他说了，'你在谈论的是破产的公司数量，但你忽略了新公司创立的情况吗？'" In this translation, I have used "确实是对的" to convey "quite right," and "忽略了" to mean "but what about," which is a common way to introduce a contrasting point in Chinese. The idiomatic expression "破产的公司数量" is used to refer to the number of firms that went bankrupt, and "新公司创立的情况" to refer to the creation of new firms.

src: But just how far short is completely uncertain — and an uncertainty that few are prepared to speculate about.
mt: 但是完全不确定的程度——这是很少有人愿意去猜测的。

src: Moreover, international operations director Richard Ferry claims that the Bracknell, Berkshire-based company's services are unique — although most rivals can offer centralised expertise, he says, no-one else can monitor computer systems remotely, or closely monitor such critical issues as temperature and air conditioning levels at any given customer site.
mt: 此外，国际业务总监理查德·费里声称，位于伯克郡布拉克内尔的公司提供的服务是独一无二的——尽管大多数竞争对手可以提供集中式的专业知识，但他说，没有其他人能远程监控计算机系统，或密切监控像温度和空调水平这样的关键问题在任何客户地点。

src: MasterChef 1990 ( BBC Books, £ 7.99 ) contains all the recipes produced by contestants in the last MasterChef television series to suit our needs.
mt: "MasterChef 1990 (BBC Books, £7.99) 包含了在最后一次MasterChef电视系列中由参赛者制作的所有食谱，以满足我们的需求。"

src: Santa Cruz Operation Inc, Santa Cruz, California leader in the low - end Unix operating system market, has now formally filed to issue an initial public offering with an initial offer of 6 m, 3.6 m of them new, with 1.2 m to be sold outside the US, at a target price of $ 12 to $ 14 a share ; it doesn't give any plans for the $ 14 m or so net proceeds.
mt: "Santa Cruz Operation Inc., 加利福尼亚州圣克鲁兹市，低端 Unix 操作系统市场的领导者，现在正式向公众提交了首次公开募股（IPO）提案，初始报价为 6.3 亿美元，其中 1.2 亿美元将出售给海外买家，目标股价为每股 12 到 14 美元；它并未透露任何关于将近 14 亿美元净收益的计划。"

src: It seemed that the manager remembered it plainly, too, because as they entered the restaurant, he emerged from behind his desk like a bolted rabbit and, before Frau Nordern had time to speak, assured her that everything would be in order if only, his hands out wide, beseechingly, if only the gnädige Frau would give him a date.
mt: "似乎经理也记得这个问题，因为当他们进入餐厅时，他像被钉在桌子后面一样从后面出现，甚至在 Frau Nordern 有时间开口之前，已经保证她一切都会顺利，只要 Frau Nordern 只需给他一个日期，他双手张开，恳求地说。" Translation: "It seemed that the manager also remembered this issue, because when they entered the restaurant, he appeared from behind his desk like a pinned rabbit, and even before Frau Nordern had a chance to speak, he assured her that everything would be in order, just if Frau Nordern would give him a date, his hands outstretched and pleading."

src: Your link's not working.
mt: 你的链接不工作。

src: I delayed switching the computer off while I tried to come up with a solution, but there was none.
mt: 我在尝试找出解决方案时延迟了关机，但没有找到任何解决方案。

src: Then he becomes more organized and responsible.
mt: 然后他变得更加有序且负责任。

src: Away to the north, Israeli cities had been attacked from Iraq's Scuds, with Tel Aviv and Haifa being the first targets.
mt: 向北，伊拉克的Scuds袭击了以色列的城市，特拉维夫和哈法是首批目标。

src: Mel's not working.
mt: 梅尔不工作。

src: If Keith Wright's performance in this match was anything to go by, then he will certainly be glad when Jackson is back to be his partner in the Hibs attack.
mt: 如果基思·怀特在这场比赛中的表现能给人留下什么印象，那么他一定会在杰克逊回归后感到高兴，成为哈茨队的进攻搭档。

src: You must defend against the attacker with your legs — one leg out ready to kick him with the heel, the other held slightly back out of reach to protect your groin.
mt: 你必须用你的腿来防御攻击者 — 一条腿伸出准备用踢脚踢他，另一条腿稍微后退以保护你的肛门。

src: The architect represents neither a Dionysian nor an Apollinian state : here it is the great act of will, the will that achieves the impossible, the frenzy of the great will which aspires to art.
mt: "这位建筑师既不是狄奥尼索斯的，也不是阿波罗的状态：这里是伟大的意志的伟大行为，能够实现不可能的事物，伟大意志的狂热，追求艺术。"

src: I will oppose this strongly and won't hesitate to organise a demonstration right outside the airport if necessary.
mt: 我会坚决反对这个，并且如果必要，我会组织在机场外面举行示威游行。

src: I have remained vigilant when we're going through Harford.
mt: 我在我们穿越哈佛顿时保持警惕。

src: Let her decide for herself.
mt: 让她自己决定。

src: To compound the misery, Taylor scored a third for Cambridge twelve minutes from time and then seconds from the final whistle Dublin scored a fourth for Cambridge United.
mt: 为了加剧痛苦，泰勒在比赛剩下十二分钟时为剑桥大学打进第三球，然后在最后哨声响起时，都柏林大学打进了第四球给剑桥联队。

src: If you have got permed hair or have been inspired by the article on Page 8, then this great give-away is for you!
mt: 如果你有染发或受到了第8页文章的启发，那么这个绝佳的赠品就是为你准备的！

src: Fernando had taken her to the Zarzuela, the Spanish operettas that had left her utterly amazed.
mt: 费尔南多带她去看了zarzuela，这些西班牙的歌剧让她完全惊叹不已。

src: Fifty quid are not of any significance, is it?
mt: 五十便士不重要吗？

src: Light given out by distant galaxies has to travel counter to the expansion to get to us.
mt: "来自遥远星系的光必须逆向宇宙膨胀才能到达我们。"

src: She liked to be outside, liked to watch the day as it grew larger or smaller, liked to be where she could see her household moving about.
mt: 她喜欢在外面，喜欢看到日子变得更大或更小，喜欢在她能看到家庭活动的地方。
